prompt: Create a square 1:1 vintage flash-photography bedroom scene at night, styled like a slightly grainy 1990s candid film snapshot with warm beige shadows, soft vignetting, and unsettling storybook surrealism. A small child with black hair lies tucked in bed on the left under a white blanket with red floral patterns; the child wears a loose white nightgown and has their face obscured by a plain square censor block. On the right, a large anthropomorphic sheep with realistic curly wool, pale cream skin, long ears, heavy sleepy eyelids, and gentle humanlike hands sits beside the bed reading a bedtime book. The sheep holds exactly 1 open picture book facing the viewer; the book cover shows a cluster of tiny sheep and the Japanese title ひつじが100ぴき in muted red. Include exactly 4 main visible objects/figures: 1 sleeping child, 1 sheep caregiver, 1 illustrated book, and 1 oval wall mirror in the upper left background reflecting a small doll-like figure in a dress. The room has aged beige wallpaper, an old-fashioned floral pillow, intimate close framing, and a slightly eerie but calm bedtime mood. Use direct on-camera flash with dim ambient room light, realistic textures, shallow depth of field, muted colors, and no modern objects, no extra characters, no watermark.
